answer: Vercel offers a free Hobby plan for personal, non-commercial projects that includes access to the Vercel CLI and Git integrations [1][2]. While these tools enable developer-focused interactions with the platform, Vercel does not provide a dedicated, separate "Developer API" tier [3][2]. Advanced features, such as self-serve enterprise-grade tools like SAML SSO or HIPAA compliance, are available to Pro users who pay a monthly platform fee [4][5]. The Hobby plan is free forever but is restricted to personal use and will pause if usage limits are exceeded [3][1][2].

results.title: Vercel Pricing: Hobby, Pro, and Enterprise plans
A more flexible Pro plan for modern teams - Vercel
